message: Hi, I tried logging in this morning and keep getting a 403 error. My account is arcvault.io/user/jsmith. This started after your update last Tuesday.
core_issue: User cannot log in due to a 403 error on account arcvault.io/user/jsmith, which began after a recent update.
summary: User reports a 403 error when logging into arcvault.io/user/jsmith, which began after a recent update. This is a high-priority issue requiring Engineering's attention.
